rules.monorepo_root_gate: when affects lists more than one app, only the root verification command can move a feature to passing

lifecycle.state_machine_full: proposed -> in_spec -> in_design -> in_progress -> in_qa -> (blocked |) passing

status_legend.not_started: Work has not begun. (light tier / lifecycle off)
status_legend.in_progress: The single current active feature. Only one at a time.
status_legend.blocked: Cannot continue until the documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification ran, passed, and evidence is recorded. Irreversible.
status_legend.proposed: (lifecycle full tier) brainstorm & analyze in progress; exit gate: brief.md complete.
status_legend.in_spec: (lifecycle full tier) requirement spec; exit gate: spec.md complete + verification recorded.
status_legend.in_design: (lifecycle full tier) technical design; exit gate: design.md complete (+ affects in monorepo).
status_legend.in_qa: (lifecycle full tier) independent QA & code review; exit gate: review.md Verdict: Accept.

features.title: {{short title}}
features.user_visible_behavior: {{what a user sees when this works, one sentence}}
affects: {{apps/packages this feature touches, e.g. web, api — from change-scope triage; use a single value or omit in a single-package repo}}
verification: {{step or command 1, e.g. curl -X POST /api/x | jq .status == 201}}
